Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class CartItem

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.CartItem
public class CartItem extends SObject

Java class for CartItem complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CartItem">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdjustmentTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Cart" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}WebCart" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CartDeliveryGroup" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}CartDeliveryGroup" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CartDeliveryGroupId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CartId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CartItemPriceAdjustments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CartItemTaxes" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DistributedAdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DistributedAdjustmentTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GrossAdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GrossUnitPrice" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ItemizedAdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ItemizedAdjustmentTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ListPrice" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NetAdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NetUnitPrice" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Product2" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Product2" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Product2Id" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Quantity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SalesPrice" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Sku" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalLineAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalLineGrossAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalLineNetAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalLineTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalListPrice" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalPrice" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalPriceAfterAllAdjustments" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalPriceTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalPromoAdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalPromoAdjustmentTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UnitAdjustedPrice" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UnitAdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
